algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived accessible restroom door operation package
algorithm_input.design_intent: Paraphrased NCARB-derived scenario: plumbing fixture and accessible restroom count. The optimizer uses fixed source-grounded code semantics while tuning visible design parameters and public scenario-model trade-offs.

scenario_facts.ncarb_scenario_theme: plumbing fixture and accessible restroom count
scenario_facts.scenario_variant_differentiator: Ordinary public restroom door operation variant.

query_preferences.meaning: balance partition footprint and accessible operation for ordinary public restroom

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.

source_task_origin.ncarb_scenario_theme: plumbing fixture and accessible restroom count

algorithm_input.scenario_variant_note: Parameterized variant with substantive changes in facts, bounds, weights, or document context; not a fully independent real project case.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_differentiator: Ordinary public restroom door operation variant.
